narrative:
Precinct South Zanesville (precinct in Muskingum County) has 1,035 registered voters, with 62.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
